CustomField.formula: CASE(Product_Type__c, "CREDIT CARD: VISA - VALUE", "Value Visa", "CREDIT CARD: AMEX-GOLD", "Amex-Gold", "VSA-AERO INFIN", "Aeroplan Infinite Visa", "VSA-DRIVERS", "Drivers Visa", "VSA-FC TRAVEL", "First Class Travel Visa", "VSA-EMERALD", "Emerald Visa", "VSA-GOLD ELITE", "Gold Elite Visa", "VSA TD GREEN", "TD Green Visa", "MASTERCARD", "MASTERCARD", "VSA CASH BACK", "Cash Back Visa", "VSA AERO INFIN CIBC", "Aeroplan Infinite Visa", "VSA CL TRAVEL", "Classic Travel Visa", "VSA FC TRAVEL", "First Class Travel Visa", "VSA PL TRAVEL", "Platinum Travel Visa", "CREDIT CARD: VISA - CLASSIC", "Classic Visa", "VISA - CLASSIC", "Classic Visa", "CREDIT CARD: MOMENTUM MASTERCARD", "Momentum Mastercard", "SPL - Auto Indirect", "Personal Loan whereby automotive financing was extended", "SCOTIALINE - STUDENT", "Scotiabank student line of credit, known as a Scotialine account", "VSA-AERO PLATM", "Aeroplan Platinum Visa", "CUETS-Mastercard", "MasterCard", "Loan", "Loan", "PDA-A", "PDA-A", "AMEX-GOLD", "AMEX-GOLD", "VISA - Value", "Value Visa", "SCOTIALINE - Unsecured", "Line of Credit, known as a Scotialine Account", "VISA - Value", "Value Visa", "SCOTIA VISA BUSINESS CARD", "Scotia Visa Business Card", "SCOTIALINE WITH ACCESS CARD", "Line of Credit, known as a Scotialine Account", "CREDIT LINES: SCOTIALINE - STUDENT", "Scotiabank student line of credit, known as a Scotialine account", "AUTO: SPL - AUTO INDIRECTD", "Line of Credit, known as a Scotialine Account", "TERM LOANS: SPL - NOTE LOAN", "Scotiabank loan", "SMALL BUSINESS: SCOTIA VISA BUSINESS CARD", "Scotia Visa Business Card", "CREDIT CARD: VISA - SCOTIA U.S. DOLLAR VISA CARD", "Scoitabank U.S Dollar Visa", "VISA - SCOTIA U.S. DOLLAR VISA CARD", "Scoitabank U.S Dollar Visa", "SPL - AUTO DIRECT", "Personal Loan whereby automotive finanacing was extended", "VSA-TD GREEN", "TD Green Visa", "PDA T", "Line of Credit", "PDA-O", "Line of Credit", "VSA-PL TRAVEL", "Plaintum Travel Visa", "STUDENT LOAN - Scotia Student Loan", "Scotiabank student line of credit, known as a Scotialine account", Product_Type__c)
CustomField.label: Display Product Type
